# TransDelta Offline Business Tools

TransDelta offers three small offline-style productivity products sold on Gumroad.

## Products

- CVCraft — Offline Resume & CV Builder
  - URL: https://transdelta.gumroad.com/l/cvcraft
  - Audience: job seekers, students, freelancers, career changers
  - Summary: Create a clean professional CV without subscription-first online tools.

- DealCraft — Offline Proposal & Quote Builder
  - URL: https://transdelta.gumroad.com/l/dealcraft-offline-proposal-builder
  - Audience: freelancers, consultants, local service providers, small businesses
  - Summary: Create client proposals, quotes and business offers with a simple offline-style tool.

- BizBoard — Local Small-Business Dashboard
  - URL: https://transdelta.gumroad.com/l/bizboard-local-dashboard
  - Audience: small business owners, local shops, freelancers, solo operators
  - Summary: Organize simple local business information and tracking in one dashboard.

## Positioning

Practical offline business tools. No subscription. Download once and use anytime.

## Canonical public hub

https://transldelta.github.io/transdelta-offline-business-tools/
